synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-50116 Oracle Linux 8 oVirt 4.5 ovirt-engine bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50116
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50116

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50116.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 oVirt 4.5 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
